name_cn:
【Full set packaging】
Small apricot in stock!!️
Toujours vertical small size, exclusive basket bag, absolutely beautiful. High-end look, oversized quilted design with classic letter accessories, very modern. Soft structure, calfskin feels premium. Unique clasp that folds the side when fastened. Comes with a long shoulder strap, very practical, and spacious. Fits all daily essentials.
size:16*12*18cm
